Order Custom Finish Line Banners for Race Events & Athletic Competitions

Make the most of your next sporting event with an eye-catching vinyl finish line banner. From marathons and 5K races to school track meets and cycling competitions, we can help you improve your event visibility and create memorable moments with our professionally designed custom finish line banners.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a banner that you're proud to display at your finish line. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks.

Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of the vinyl banner industry and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made finish line banner. If something doesn't meet our standards, our staff of in-house graphic designers will contact you to fix it immediately. Your satisfaction is our number one priority.

We offer a wide selection of custom finish line banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can even choose production time to ensure your banner is delivered when you need it for race day.

Six Customizable Banner Materials

Your finish line banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Note: Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance).

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vinyl Banner Materials for Outdoor Finish Line Displays

Choose from our selection of high-quality vinyl materials designed to withstand outdoor racing conditions and provide clear visibility for participants and spectators.

13 oz. Vinyl Material

Our standard 13 oz. vinyl material provides excellent durability for outdoor finish line displays. This material offers vibrant color reproduction and weather resistance suitable for most racing events.

Premium Vinyl Options

For enhanced durability in challenging weather conditions, consider our premium vinyl materials that provide additional wind resistance and longevity for multiple race events.

Indoor Event Materials

Lighter weight materials are available for indoor track events and gymnasium finish line displays where wind resistance is not a primary concern.

All materials are printed with UV-resistant inks to maintain color vibrancy throughout your racing season.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finish Line Banner Finishing Options for Secure Event Installation

Ensure your finish line banner stays securely in place during race events with our professional finishing options designed for athletic competitions.

Grommets for Secure Mounting

Brass grommets placed every 2-3 feet provide secure attachment points for rope, bungee cords, or zip ties. Essential for outdoor racing events where wind resistance is important.

Pole Pockets

Top and bottom pole pockets allow for easy installation on finish line structures and provide a clean, professional appearance for race photography.

Reinforced Edges

Double-hemmed edges provide additional durability for finish line banners that will be used for multiple racing events throughout a season.

Custom Mounting Solutions

Specialty finishing options are available for unique finish line installations. Contact our team to discuss custom requirements for your specific race venue.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Finish Line Banner Production & Turnaround Times

Plan your race event timeline with our reliable production schedules designed to meet your competition deadlines.

Standard Production

3-5 business days for most finish line banner orders. Ideal for advance race planning and allows time for artwork revisions if needed.

Rush Production Options

24-48 hour rush production available for last-minute race events. Rush fees apply and artwork must be print-ready upon order placement.

Seasonal Planning

For race series or multiple events throughout a season, consider placing orders in advance during our off-peak periods for optimal pricing and guaranteed delivery dates.

Shipping Transit Time

Production time does not include shipping transit. Factor in additional shipping days based on your location and selected shipping method to ensure delivery before your race date.

Important: Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. Contact us for custom freight quotes if folding is not acceptable for your finish line banner.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finish Line Banner Payment & Ordering Options

Flexible payment solutions for race organizations, schools, and event planners ordering custom finish line banners.

Online Payment Processing

Secure online checkout accepts all major credit cards, PayPal, and business debit cards for immediate order processing.

Invoicing for Organizations

Net 30 invoicing available for established race organizations, schools, and athletic departments. Credit approval required for invoicing terms.

Bulk Order Pricing

Volume discounts available for race series, multi-event seasons, or organizations ordering multiple finish line banners throughout the year.

Custom Quote Requests

Special pricing available for large quantity orders, unique sizes, or specialty finishing requirements. Request a custom quote for detailed pricing on complex finish line banner projects.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Finish Line Banner Delivery

Reliable delivery options to ensure your finish line banner arrives on time for race day.

Standard Ground Shipping

5-7 business day delivery via UPS Ground or FedEx Ground. Most cost-effective option for advance race planning.

Expedited Shipping

2-3 day and overnight shipping options available for time-sensitive race events. Expedited shipping rates apply.

Large Banner Shipping

Banners exceeding 8 feet in both directions will be folded for standard shipping. Freight shipping available to avoid folding - contact us for freight quotes.

Race Venue Delivery

Direct shipping to race venues, parks, or event locations available. Ensure someone will be available to receive the package at the delivery address.

Shipping Insurance

Optional shipping insurance available for high-value orders or time-critical race events where replacement time is limited.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Sports & Racing Event Uses for Finish Line Banners

Custom finish line banners enhance the competitive experience across a wide variety of athletic events and racing competitions.

Running Events

Marathons, half-marathons, 5K races, 10K races, trail runs, charity runs, and fun runs. Create memorable finish line moments for participants and clear photo opportunities for race documentation.

Cycling Competitions

Road races, criteriums, mountain bike events, BMX races, and charity bike rides. Durable vinyl construction withstands outdoor cycling event conditions.

School Athletic Events

Track and field meets, cross country races, field day events, and school fun runs. Customizable with school colors, logos, and event branding.

Triathlon & Multi-Sport Events

Ironman events, sprint triathlons, duathlons, and obstacle course races. Weather-resistant materials suitable for long-duration outdoor events.

Corporate & Charity Events

Company fun runs, fundraising walks, team building races, and community health events. Professional appearance enhances corporate event branding.

Youth Sports

Youth league races, summer camp competitions, scouts events, and recreational youth athletics. Bright colors and custom designs create excitement for young participants.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finish Line Banner Artwork Requirements for Racing Events

Ensure optimal print quality for your finish line banner with our professional artwork guidelines designed for racing event displays.

File Format Requirements

Preferred formats: PDF, AI, EPS, or high-resolution PNG files. Vector formats (AI, EPS) provide the best quality for large finish line banner sizes.

Resolution Guidelines

Minimum 150 DPI at actual banner size. For large finish line banners, 100 DPI is acceptable due to typical viewing distances at racing events.

Design Templates

Download free finish line banner templates in common racing event sizes. Templates include proper bleed areas and safe zones for text placement.

Color Specifications

CMYK color mode required for print production. RGB files will be converted, which may result in color shifts. Pantone color matching available for specific race event branding.

Typography Considerations

Bold, easy-to-read fonts work best for finish line banners viewed from distances. Minimum recommended text height is 6 inches for optimal readability by race participants.

Design Assistance

Professional design services available if you need help creating your finish line banner artwork. Our designers specialize in racing event graphics and athletic competition branding.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Order Your Custom Finish Line Banner Today

Ready to create an unforgettable finish line experience for your next racing event? Our custom finish line banners are designed specifically for athletic competitions, offering the durability and visual impact needed to celebrate your participants' achievements.

Get started on your order today using our online design tool, upload your existing artwork, or work with our professional design team to create the perfect finish line banner for your race event.

Need assistance with your order? Our experienced customer support team understands the unique requirements of racing events and athletic competitions. We're here to help ensure your finish line banner meets your specific event needs and arrives on time for race day.

For special projects, unique sizes, or larger quantity orders, we can customize your order through a custom quote. This is ideal for race series, multi-event seasons, or organizations with specific finish line banner requirements.

Why Choose Banners.com for Your Finish Line Banner?

  • Manufactured and printed in the USA with premium materials
  • Experienced design team familiar with racing event requirements
  • Fast turnaround times to meet your race day deadlines
  • Weather-resistant vinyl construction for outdoor events

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finish Line Banner Questions & Ordering Support

What size finish line banner do I need for my race event?

Banner size depends on your venue and number of participants. For most running events, 3'x8' to 4'x12' banners work well. Larger cycling events or marathons may require 4'x16' or custom sizes. Consider the width of your finish line area and viewing distance for participants.

Can finish line banners withstand outdoor racing conditions?

Yes, our vinyl finish line banners are specifically designed for outdoor athletic events. The 13 oz. vinyl material is weather-resistant and UV-protected. Proper installation with grommets or pole pockets ensures secure mounting during windy conditions typical at outdoor race venues.

How far in advance should I order my finish line banner?

We recommend ordering at least 2 weeks before your race date to allow for standard production time and shipping. This also provides time for artwork revisions if needed. Rush production is available for last-minute events, but advance planning ensures the best pricing and delivery options.

Do you offer templates for common racing events?

Yes, we provide free downloadable templates for popular finish line banner sizes. Templates include proper design specifications and suggested text placement for optimal readability during racing events. You can also use our online design tool with race-specific graphics and fonts.

What's the best way to install a finish line banner at my race venue?

Installation method depends on your venue setup. Grommets work well with rope or bungee cords between posts or trees. Pole pockets provide a clean look when using finish line structures or portable banner stands. Our customer service team can recommend the best finishing option for your specific venue.

Can I reuse my finish line banner for multiple race events?

Absolutely. Our durable vinyl construction is designed to withstand multiple uses throughout a racing season. Proper storage between events and careful installation will maximize banner lifespan. Many race organizations use the same finish line banner for their entire annual event series.

Do you offer quantity discounts for race series or multiple events?

Yes, volume pricing is available for organizations ordering multiple finish line banners or planning a series of races throughout the year. Contact us for a custom quote that includes quantity discounts and special pricing for recurring race event needs.

Still have questions? Call us at (320) 391-5300 and speak with our customer service team who specializes in racing event signage and athletic competition banners.
